name: kalimba-tone-trace
description: Kalimba ToneTrace, a local-first kalimba listening and follow-practice PWA.

scripts.check: npm run validate:songs && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/songs.js && node --check src/song-store.js && node --check src/song-library.js && node --check src/pitch.js && node --check service-worker.js
